from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_bug_exposed():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 2), (20, 4), (1, 5)]
    expected_value = 7  # Exactly fits the knapsack with (1, 5) and (3, 2)
    
    result = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == expected_value, f"Expected knapsack value to be {expected_value}, but got {result}"

def test_knapsack_bug_exposed():
    from source import knapsack
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    expected_value = 10
    result = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == expected_value, f"Expected knapsack value to be {expected_value}, but got {result}"
